# default

**Type Property**

Returns the singleton session object for the current device.

## Declaration

```swift
class var `default`: WCSession { get }
```

## Return Value

The session object for the current device.

## Discussion

Call the [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSession/isSupported()] method before calling this method to make sure you can use session objects for communication.

## Getting the Default Session

- **isSupported()**: Returns a Boolean value indicating whether the current iOS device is able to use a session object.
